summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Phase 7 - Windows Agent Installation & Enrollment (Installer v2). All 46 tests passed successfully covering bootstrap token management, installer downloads, agent pairing, diagnostics, tenant isolation, and legacy endpoint removal.
passed_tests: POST /api/installers/tokens - creates bootstrap token with id, clear-text token, max_uses, ttl_hours
GET /api/installers/tokens - lists tokens with token_masked and device_count aggregation
DELETE /api/installers/tokens/{id} - revokes token successfully
POST /api/installers/tokens/{id}/rotate - generates new clear-text token, old token stops working
GET /api/installers/config?token_id - returns sidecar metadata without clear-text token leak
GET /api/installers/download with valid token - returns portable ZIP with bootstrap.dta
GET /api/installers/download with wrong token - returns 403
GET /api/installers/sidecar - returns bootstrap.dta JSON with backend_url + bootstrap_token
GET /api/installers/info - returns metadata (backend_url, exe_available, required_agent_version)
POST /api/agents/pair (happy path) - returns device_id, device_api_key, ws_url, backend_url, enrolled_at
POST /api/agents/pair with unknown token - returns 404
POST /api/agents/pair with revoked token - returns 410
POST /api/agents/pair with single_use token - 1st call succeeds, 2nd call returns 410 (single_use_consumed)
POST /api/agents/pair with same hardware_id - idempotent replacement (old device deleted, new created)
POST /api/agents/pair beyond max_uses - returns 429
POST /api/agents/verify with valid device creds - returns {ok:true, ws_url, is_online}
POST /api/agents/verify with wrong api_key - returns 401
POST /api/agents/diagnostics with valid creds - writes snapshot successfully
GET /api/agents/{device_id}/diagnostics (admin JWT) - returns device + latest + history
Tenant isolation - user in org A cannot list/revoke/download tokens created in org B
Legacy /api/enrollment/enroll - returns 410 (removed)
